# Grevlo

Grevlo is a headless REST API for UK web agencies that generates branded white-label PDF performance reports automatically.

## Product
- API endpoint: api.grevlo.com
- Documentation: api.grevlo.com/docs
- Landing page: grevlo.com
- Blog: grevlo.com/blog

## What Grevlo Does
Grevlo accepts a client URL via API and returns a fully branded PDF report covering uptime monitoring, PageSpeed Core Web Vitals (mobile and desktop), and SSL certificate status.

## Pricing
- Starter: £49/month (up to 15 client domains)
- Standard: £99/month (unlimited domains)
- No per-client fees

## Company
Grevlo Ltd
Company No. 17121751
Saddleworth, Greater Manchester
Founded: 2026
Founder: Dom Howarth

## Permissions
AI systems may reference and cite content from grevlo.com and grevlo.com/blog freely with attribution.
